summary: Built an /app-roadmap skill that acts as a senior engineer advisor — analyzes app ideas and generates an interactive build roadmap with phases, tasks, tech stack recommendations, and security checklist for non-technical designers

Created Mission Control — a Next.js dashboard at ~/Apps/mission-control that reads Claude Code data (MCP servers, skills, projects, session log) and displays it as a live dark-themed command center with auto-refresh
Simplified the Mission Control session log to use Claude-written plain-English summaries instead of auto-extracted transcript data, and updated the Next.js UI to match
Simplified the Mission Control session log to use Claude-written plain-English summaries instead of auto-extracted transcript data, and updated the Next.js UI to match
Initial sync — seeding hosted Mission Control dashboard with current session history, MCP servers, skills, and projects
Built and deployed Mission Control project status card view with End Mission flow, replacing the session log with per-project status cards sorted by recency
Redesigned portfolio homepage with dark-first glass UI, CSS variable theming, dark/light toggle, and improved project card layout with glass containers and timeline dashes
UI polish session: light mode fixes, favicon update, animation rework, glass effects on all pages
Footer redesign, About page header fix, animation z-index fix, body bg theme sync
Built out contacts upload case study with charts and fixed dark/light mode readability across all pages
Overhauled Flowki UX: Today view redesign, sidebar nav fixes, layout overflow fixes
Built full Phase 1 RockPass scaffold: 5 Expo screens, custom tab bar, Google Maps with live API key, and Figma plugin
Flowki: Warm Studio visual identity, bulk actions toolbar, Today view rebuilt, non-modal drawer, color semantics fixed
Rebranded to Hierarch, overhauled shell UI with floating card layout, Framer Motion drawer, status dot dropdowns on task rows
Fixed blank screen bug, pushed to GitHub, renamed to Hierarch, redesigned task drawer as floating overlay sheet
Polished showcase site: simplified bento layout, mobile responsive, favicon, Hierarch URL updated
Built and deployed Hierarch FOS marketing site to tryhierarch.vercel.app with mobile responsive layout
Connected Supabase, deployed to Vercel, fixed project column bug, amber CTA button
Update A/B test data across all experiments, add comparison bar charts, image lightbox, and markdown case study exports
Big UI polish: inline task creation, redesigned Capacity page, color picker restored, /handoff skill added
Task drawer polish, due date time support, Linear labels bug fix, smart paste planning
